channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple pushes 'critical' software alerts to iPhones running out-of-date versions of iOS — here's how to stay safe
item.description: Apple is taking an additional step to keep older iPhones protected from the latest exploits.

item.title: Save up to $300 on this RTX 5070Ti-powered gaming PC with 32GB RAM and a free copy of Resident Evil Requiem
item.description: It's your last chance to shop this clearance sale

item.title: Whatever Just Happened with ‘Fruit Love Island,’ Nobody Won
item.description: It appears the anonymous creator deleted their account. Is there anything to learn from all this?

item.title: Quel ordinateur portable choisir pour moins de 1000 euros en 2026 ?
item.description: On trouve aujourd'hui d'excellents ordinateurs portables avec un rapport qualité/prix intéressant. Mais l'offre est très variée, alors comment choisir ? Voici nos recommandations des meilleurs modèles de PC portables sous les 1 000 euros.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale has the Soundcore Sleep A30 Special earbuds down to a record-low price
item.description: The Soundcore Sleep A30 Special earbuds are on sale for $179.99 at Amazon, down from the normal price of $199.99. The older Soundcore Sleep A20 earbuds are on sale for $119.99.

item.title: Bluesky's next product is an AI assistant that helps build custom social media feeds
item.description: Bluesky is the latest social media platform to throw its hat into the AI chatbot ring. Bluesky, but specifically its chief innovation officer Jay Graber and her new Exploration team, built a new AI assistant called Attie that's designed to help users create custom feeds. Graber called Attie an "agentic social app" that's built on its its open-source framework called the AT Protocol. To use Attie, users can punch in prompts in natural language to generate social feeds without having to know how to code. On the Attie website, examples include prompts like, "Show me electronic music and experimen...

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon's third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over until […]

item.title: Sora’s shutdown could be a reality check moment for AI video
item.description: Is this just normal corporate strategy, or are we about to see a broader pullback on AI-generated video?

item.title: AMC Puts a Stake in ‘Talamasca’ After One Season
item.description: The Immortal Universe will continue on without 'Talamasca,' but some of its characters may migrate to other shows.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: When a robotaxi has to call 911
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Ive tracked TV prices for years — the best Amazon Spring Sale TV deals are from Hisense and TCL
item.description: Amazon Big Spring Sale TV deals go past its own Fire TVs. Now that 2026 TVs are out, Amazon is putting top 2025 QLED TVs on sale.

item.title: When product managers ship code: AI just broke the software org chart
item.description: Last week, one of our product managers (PMs) built and shipped a feature. Not spec'd it. Not filed a ticket for it. Built it, tested it, and shipped it to production. In a day.A few days earlier, our designer noticed that the visual appearance of our IDE plugins had drifted from the design system. In the old world, that meant screenshots, a JIRA ticket, a conversation to explain the intent, and a sprint slot. Instead, he opened an agent, adjusted the layout himself, experimented, iterated, and tuned in real time, then pushed the fix. The person with the strongest design intuition fixed the des...

item.title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra vs Google Pixel 10 Pro XL : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone haut de gamme ?
item.description: Si Google produit d'excellents smartphones, il peine toujours à se démarquer sur le segment du très haut de gamme. Le Pixel 10 Pro XL peut-il seulement rivaliser avec un Xiaomi 17 Ultra plus conquérant que jamais ?

item.title: The best iPad deals in Amazons Spring Sale: iPads are selling out fast, get the deals while theyre still live
item.description: Shop the best iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. But shop fast because deals are selling out.
